SSC Investigators SSC Investigators

SSC Investigators

Raphael Bernier, Ph.D.
 University of Washington

Edwin Cook, Jr., M.D.
 University of Illinois at Chicago

Mayada Elsabbagh, Ph.D. (Original Investigator: Eric Fombonne, M.D.)
 McGill University

Daniel Geschwind, M.D., Ph.D.
 University of California, Los Angeles

Robin Goin-Kochel, Ph.D. (Original Investigator: Arthur Beaudet, M.D.)
 Baylor College of Medicine

Ellen Hanson, Ph.D., Christopher Walsh, M.D., Ph.D.
 Children’s Hospital Boston/ Harvard Medical School

Catherine Lord, Ph.D.
 University of Michigan

Judith Miles, M.D., Ph.D.
 University of Missouri

Pamela Ventola, Ph.D. (Original Investigator: Kevin Pelphrey, Ph.D.)
Yale University

Bradley Peterson, M.D.
 Columbia University

Celine Saulnier, Ph.D. (Original Investigator: Christa Lese Martin, Ph.D.)
 Emory University

James Sutcliffe, Ph.D.
 Vanderbilt University
